title: Streamlining Content Scheduling in Hotels to Maximize Guest Experiences
excerpt: The hospitality industry is constantly evolving, and hotels and resorts are increasingly relying on digital signage to enhance guest experiences and improve operational efficiency. Digital signage pro...
content:
The hospitality industry is constantly evolving, and hotels and resorts are increasingly relying on digital signage to enhance guest experiences and improve operational efficiency. Digital signage provides a versatile platform for communicating with guests, offering dynamic updates and promotional content that can be displayed in real-time. Whether used in lobbies, conference rooms, elevators, or guest rooms, these digital displays help keep guests informed and engaged.

Digital signage is more than just a tool for displaying information; it has become a key asset in shaping a guest’s overall experience. Hotels are using it to share real-time updates on events, weather forecasts, and local attractions, making the guest experience more seamless and interactive.

Key Benefits of Digital Signage

  1. Enhanced Guest Engagement: Guests are naturally drawn to interactive digital displays, and hotels can use this to showcase services, promotions, and local highlights. Studies show that guests are 30% more likely to engage with interactive and dynamic content than with static displays.
  2. Real-Time Information: Digital signage allows hotels to provide real-time updates, ensuring guests are always informed of the latest events, news, and weather conditions.
  3. Operational Efficiency: By reducing the need for printed materials and manual updates, digital signage improves operational efficiency, freeing up staff to focus on more personalized guest services.
  4. Revenue Generation: Hotels can leverage digital signage to promote on-site services, such as spa packages, dining options, or events, creating additional revenue streams. 
  5. Personalized Experiences: Hotels can use guest data to tailor messaging and recommendations, further enhancing the guest experience and driving loyalty.

Challenges of Content Management in the Hospitality Industry

Despite the advantages, many hotels are still relying on outdated methods for managing their digital signage. Manually updating displays with USB drives is a time-consuming and inefficient process that can lead to outdated content being shown to guests. This challenge becomes particularly evident during busy times, such as conferences or large events, when content needs to be updated frequently to keep guests informed of schedules and services.

Manual scheduling also presents several logistical challenges. Staff members are often required to physically update each screen individually, which is not only labour-intensive but also increases the risk of inconsistencies across displays. This can result in some screens showing outdated content, detracting from the overall guest experience.

Automating Content Scheduling: A Smarter Approach

To address these challenges, many hotels are turning to automated content scheduling systems. These systems allow hotel staff to manage and schedule content remotely, eliminating the need for manual updates and ensuring that all screens display consistent and up-to-date information.

By automating content scheduling, hotels can:

  • Save Time: Staff no longer need to spend hours manually updating content. With automated systems, content can be scheduled in advance, ensuring the right information is displayed at the right time.
  • Ensure Consistency: All digital displays can be updated simultaneously, guaranteeing that guests receive the same information across the entire property.
  • Improve Accuracy: Automated systems reduce the risk of human error, ensuring that outdated content is never displayed.
  • Adapt Quickly: In the fast-paced environment of a hotel, plans can change quickly. Automated systems allow hotels to make real-time updates to their signage, keeping guests informed of last-minute changes or promotions.

Streamlining Content Scheduling with LMX Content

For hotels looking to eliminate the burden of manual content scheduling, Location Media Xchange’s LMX Content provides a comprehensive solution. LMX Content automates the entire process, allowing hotels to manage their digital signage remotely and update content in real time across multiple displays.

By adopting LMX Content, hotels can streamline their content scheduling process, save time, and ensure that all screens are consistently displaying the latest information. Whether it’s promoting in-house services, sharing event schedules, or displaying local attractions, LMX Content enables hotels to maintain a high level of operational efficiency while delivering a superior guest experience.

One example is Hyatt Regency, which implemented LMX Content to enhance guest experiences by targeting different audience segments, including business travellers, leisure guests, and event attendees. Hyatt Regency installed 15 interactive screens in high-traffic areas like the lobby, restaurants, conference rooms, and fitness centre. They also replaced traditional paper welcomes with digital screens that displayed personalized greetings for arriving guests. By tailoring content to the specific needs of their guests, the hotel saw a 40% increase in guest engagement with hotel services and achieved a significant return on investment with more cost-effective content delivery.

Unlocking the Full Potential of Digital Signage with LMX

Digital signage is rapidly transforming the hospitality sector by providing hotels with a versatile tool to engage guests and improve operational efficiency. However, the challenges of manual content scheduling can prevent hotels from maximizing the benefits of this technology. By leveraging automated solutions like LMX Content, hotels can streamline their content management processes, reduce the need for manual updates, and ensure consistent, real-time communication with guests. 

With LMX Content, hotels can focus on what matters most—providing an exceptional experience for every guest, every stay. Talk to us today to find out more about the solution.

title: A Roadmap Towards Sustainable OOH Media
excerpt: On 6th September 2024, Moving Hearts, the ESG initiative of MovingWalls, successfully  hosted "Media for a Better World: A Roadmap Towards Sustainable OOH Media. " This pivotal event brought tog...
content:
On 6th September 2024, Moving Hearts, the ESG initiative of MovingWalls, successfully  hosted "Media for a Better World: A Roadmap Towards Sustainable OOH Media." This pivotal event brought together industry leaders, brands, agencies, media owners, and associations to create a more sustainable future for the Out-Of-Home (OOH) advertising industry.

The event, fueled by groundbreaking research from the Asia School of Business (ASB) students, unveiled an open-source roadmap designed to guide the industry towards net-zero emissions. The comprehensive study highlighted both the challenges and opportunities in achieving sustainability within OOH advertising.
"Our goal is to make sustainability a standard practice across the OOH industry, not just an aspirational add-on." – Srikanth Ramachandran, Founder & Group CEO of MovingWalls Group.

Event Highlights

Panel Sessions:

  • Panel Discussion 1: The Green Shift – Redefining Classic OOH Practices
    Industry leaders such as Omar Oshaari (IAA) and Maaresh Starling (OAAM) explored the necessity of shifting classic OOH practices towards sustainability. The discussion focused on the use of biodegradable materials and the critical role of leading by example.
    • Key Takeaways: The importance of redefining traditional methods, fostering genuine sustainability efforts, and setting an industry-wide example.
    • Quote: “It’s up to each of us to drive this change and impact future generations.” – Omar Oshaari, Vice President, IAA.
  • Panel Discussion 2: Reinventing Digital Billboards – Environmental Impact and the Path to Net-Zero
    Experts including Bala Pomaleh (IPG Mediabrands) and Ranganathan Somanathan (Publicis Media) delved into the environmental impact of Digital OOH. They discussed scalable, cost-effective solutions that ensure sustainability without compromising advertising effectiveness.
    • Key Takeaways: Balancing sustainability with business objectives, integrating new practices, and addressing the needs of SMEs.
    • Quote: “Sustainability is about moderation and integrating purpose into every aspect of business.” – Abdul Sani Abdul Murad, Group CMO, RHB Banking Group.

The event was characterized by active audience participation, with lively Q&A sessions and meaningful networking opportunities that fostered collaboration and shared insights.

The event concluded with a renewed sense of purpose among attendees, unified by the common goal of building a sustainable future for OOH media. Moving Hearts extends heartfelt gratitude to all participants and contributors, making this event a pivotal moment in the OOH industry’s journey towards sustainability.

With a strong sense of commitment and purpose, participants left the event inspired and ready to advance the industry’s sustainability efforts.

Join us as we continue to drive forward on our journey towards a more sustainable future in OOH media.
author: dinesh

title: Optimizing OOH Media Assets: How Media Owners Can Enhance Visibility and Drive Revenue
excerpt: Outdoor advertising has long been considered the ultimate drum-beating media channel. It's big, bold, beautiful, and now, more than ever, it's capable of delivering contextual and real-time-based cont...
content:
Outdoor advertising has long been considered the ultimate drum-beating media channel. It's big, bold, beautiful, and now, more than ever, it's capable of delivering contextual and real-time-based content. In a world where consumers are constantly bombarded with digital ads, outdoor advertising stands tall—literally—cutting through the noise with its physical presence and eye-catching designs. This form of advertising has also become more accessible for businesses of all sizes, including those with smaller budgets, making it a viable option for growing businesses looking to expand their reach.

The Challenge of Brand Awareness

For new and growing businesses, creating brand awareness with the right audiences is one of the biggest challenges they face. The marketplace is crowded, and standing out among competitors can seem like an uphill battle, especially when many businesses rely heavily on digital marketing efforts. While digital platforms are crucial for any marketing strategy, they can often feel impersonal or easily ignored. This is where outdoor advertising comes in. Having a presence in the physical world not only gives these brands credibility but also helps them stand out over competitors who depend solely on online marketing. The visibility that comes with outdoor advertising can make a significant difference in how a brand is perceived.

Why SMEs Are Embracing Self-Serve OOH Advertising—and How Media Owners Benefit

Small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) are increasingly turning to out-of-home (OOH) advertising to achieve their business goals, particularly through self-serve platforms that allow for localized ad placements. The physical nature of OOH advertising, like billboards, offers visibility that digital ads often can’t match, making it a compelling choice for SMEs. 

For OOH media owners, the rise of self-serve solutions like LMX Online Self-Serve (OSS) presents a significant opportunity. This not only broadens the pool of potential advertisers but also ensures that media owners can efficiently fill their available spaces with minimal effort.

The self-serve solution allows media owners to attract and accommodate a wider range of advertisers, including those with smaller budgets, by offering a straightforward and user-friendly interface. This empowers media owners to optimize their inventory and maximize revenue, as more businesses—especially local SMEs—are able to take advantage of OOH advertising opportunities.

Transparency and Visibility: The OOH Advantage

The sheer physical nature of a billboard placement trumps just about any other ad format. It instantly increases a brand’s visibility, making it an essential tool for businesses looking to make the leap from a start-up to an established brand. In today's fast-paced world, being easily recognizable is crucial, and there's no better way to achieve this than by having the sort of physical presence that only billboards can provide. 

Transparency in the advertising process plays a crucial role in maximizing the effectiveness of OOH campaigns. For media owners, the LMX Registry serves as a centralized database, acting as the single source of truth for all media assets. This platform ensures that all relevant data is accurate, up-to-date, and easily accessible, simplifying the process of managing and selling ad space.

By consolidating media asset information into a single, transparent system, the LMX Registry makes it easier for media owners to manage their inventory, improve operational efficiency, and enhance the discoverability of their offerings to potential buyers. This transparency is particularly beneficial for sales teams, who can leverage the solution to provide clients with clear and accurate information, helping them make informed decisions quickly.

Highly Targeted Reach: Hitting the Mark with OOH

One of the key benefits of OOH advertising is its ability to offer highly targeted reach. The best outdoor ads are strategically placed in areas where the masses congregate, ensuring maximum exposure. Businesses also have the advantage of selecting locations that their target audiences frequent, allowing them to effectively reach the right people at the right time. 

Outdoor advertisements immediately put your brand in front of your target audience, making it an incredibly effective tool for brand awareness. Running an outdoor campaign is also fairly straightforward if you have a location and objective in mind. With the right strategy, businesses can create targeted custom audience segments by analyzing consumer preferences. This level of personalization is amplified through effective content management systems (CMS) like LMX Content. LMX Content plays a critical role in differentiating this level of personalization. Together with advanced analytic tools and integrated data feeds, both screen owners and marketers can identify and track consumer behaviors based on audience profiles and location intelligence. This allows them to automate ad delivery on a more personal level, ensuring that their messages resonate with the right audiences.

What Does LMX Offer?

Location Media Xchange’s technology leads the way in innovating the OOH advertising space, specifically tailored to meet the needs of media owners. Our solutions are designed to simplify and optimise the management of media inventory, making it easier than ever for media owners to oversee and monetise their assets.

With LMX, media owners can efficiently manage their inventory, ensuring that each media site is fully utilised and generating maximum revenue. Our platform provides tools that streamline the entire process—from uploading content to booking sites—allowing media owners to focus on what they do best: managing and growing their inventory.

In a world where consumer attention is a valuable commodity, outdoor advertising continues to prove its worth as a powerful marketing tool. With the right technology and strategy, businesses of all sizes can harness the power of OOH to achieve their marketing goals and stand out in a crowded marketplace. LMX is at the forefront of this transformation, empowering businesses to take control of their advertising efforts and make a lasting impact. Reach out to us here to find out more about our solutions.
author: dinesh

title: There’s More to OOH
excerpt: Published By: Outdoor Asia, Volume 16 Kuala Lumpur, August 2024 People don’t buy what you do. They buy why you do it. Simon Sinek pointed to a host of companies whose core purpose has set them apart a...
content:
Published By: Outdoor Asia, Volume 16

Kuala Lumpur, August 2024

People don’t buy what you do. They buy why you do it. Simon Sinek pointed to a host of companies whose core purpose has set them apart and positioned them for continued success.

Patagonia was founded to help people explore wild places. Protecting these wild places has become a core purpose. They just happen to make outdoor clothing that resonates with those who care about the environment.

Tesla’s single purpose is to accelerate the world’s transition to sustainable energy. They just happen to make energy-efficient vehicles that are affordable and appeal to those who are driving towards a similar transition. 

Similarly, in the advertising and media space, giants like Google, Meta, and now TikTok didn’t just stumble upon billion-dollar business empires. They tapped into the basic human need for social interaction and communication, with advertising becoming a natural byproduct. These companies show that when people identify with your purpose and not just your product, success follows. 

Now, let’s use this lens on Out-of-Home (OOH) media. Way before sophisticated maps and mobile applications, billboard signs were the original location guides, welcoming us to specific places or pointing to a nearby diner or store.

Billboards were built to empower local merchants and community commerce. As OOH companies expanded beyond these neighbourhoods, their client base grew. OOH media evolved into a powerful “reach” option for the advertisers, though the content often lacked local relevance with a few exceptions. 

One of the most successful OOH media companies ever, JCDecaux was a pioneer in bringing some of this purpose back. They reimagined bus shelter advertising as street furniture that also provided comfort to passengers waiting for a bus.

This innovative approach was not just built for advertising but improved the urban environment for everyday commuters - the local community. Over time, this concept has evolved into smart city installations that go beyond comfort, offering realtime updates on bus arrival times and other useful information to enhance the passenger experience.

Billboards are now screens and they are present everywhere. Modern digital billboards can execute nationwide campaigns while delivering hyperlocal content tailored to specific times of day and environmental factors like weather and traffic.

The ads are more contextual and relevant to people around the signs. Ocean Outdoor has been a proud supporter of global sports events like the Olympics, showcasing live updates, medal tallies, and highlights.

This commitment extends beyond just sports; their “Drops in the Ocean” initiative highlights their dedication to sustainability and environmental responsibility, illustrating how even small efforts can make a significant impact on our planet.

But it isn’t just the physical signages that are becoming digital. Every aspect of the OOH business, from inventory management and availability to booking, content flow, execution, analytics and online bookings are made possible using various software. The humble billboard has come a long way, proving that even in a digital world, it can still stand tall and proud. However, OOH media is still trying to rediscover its purpose… its raison d’être`

The path to OOH’s purpose 

The power of billboards to influence local communities was vividly illustrated in the critically acclaimed film Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri. This story showed how a few strategically placed signages could stir emotions and spark conversations on a grand scale. 

Can OOH media take on the mantle of communicating and engaging local communities to solve some of today’s pressing problems?

Many of us in the industry believe so and have already started making small but significant steps toward making a difference. I believe there are three themes that can be championed by the OOH media stakeholders to move OOH media closer to a purpose.

First, Community Commerce supports local merchants by promoting neighbourhood businesses and fostering local economies. Second, a Community Bulletin provides real-time updates on traffic, weather, and other essential information, enhancing the daily lives of community members. Finally, Community Causes champions local and global initiatives, using the power of billboards to raise awareness and drive action for important social and environmental issues. 

Each of these requires a combination of technology, OOH product development, marketing and campaign execution. Leveraging MovingWalls technology platform, the Moving Hearts initiative focuses on developing OOH products that can be delivered on a self-serve portal for scalable implementation. This initiative has already supported over 20 community causes across multiple markets in Southeast Asia, influencing the hearts of three million people. 

We have now started working on carbon reduction initiatives that involve recycling, implementing technology to reduce electricity consumption, and eventually offsetting the carbon generated by OOH campaigns. 

Through these actions, we aim to not only reduce our own carbon footprint but also inspire others in the OOH industry to take meaningful steps toward a greener future. The recent announcement of Ad Net Zero by 50 of the world’s leading advertisers will undoubtedly accelerate the adoption of green technologies in the OOH media industry. 

I believe that OOH media is moving towards a common purpose. At the very heart of this are the local communities who experience OOH media every day. Everyone in the value chain - media owners, agencies, advertisers, and technology solution providers like us - has a role to deliver OOH media with a heart. By design, OOH media remains closest to the masses and these signages are viewed collectively. It is only right that we should strive to always make a positive impact.
author: dinesh

title: Essential SSP Features for Retail Media Owners in DOOH Advertising
excerpt: Digital out-of-home (DOOH) advertising has revolutionized the way brands engage with consumers in the physical world. As the demand for DOOH continues to grow, media owners must leverage Supply Side P...
content:
Digital out-of-home (DOOH) advertising has revolutionized the way brands engage with consumers in the physical world. As the demand for DOOH continues to grow, media owners must leverage Supply Side Platforms (SSPs) effectively to maximize the value of their digital inventory. For retail media owners, selecting the right SSP platform is crucial to optimizing their DOOH campaigns. In this article, we delve into the key features that media owners should look for in an SSP platform to ensure the success of their DOOH campaigns.

Streamlined Inventory Management

An effective SSP should offer robust inventory management capabilities, allowing digital signage owners to easily organize and monetize their digital screens. Advanced features such as real-time inventory updates and dynamic pricing enable media owners to optimize revenue and fill rates. Retail media owners often juggle a variety of inventory types and locations, making it pivotal to have a centralized system that provides clear visibility and control over all assets.

  • Real-time Inventory Updates: Keeping track of available slots and their occupancy status in real-time helps in making quick decisions and adjustments. This ensures that no opportunity is missed, and every slot is optimally utilized.
  • Dynamic Pricing: The ability to adjust prices based on demand, time of day, or audience traffic can significantly enhance revenue potential. Dynamic pricing allows for premium pricing during peak times and promotional rates during off-peak periods.

By employing a comprehensive inventory management system, retail media owners can ensure their digital assets are used to their full potential, optimizing both profitability and operational efficiency.

Precision Targeting Capabilities

Precise targeting is essential for delivering relevant ads to the right audience. Media owners should seek SSP platforms with sophisticated targeting capabilities, including geolocation, demographic, and contextual targeting options. These features empower media owners to attract high-value advertisers and drive campaign effectiveness.

  • Geolocation Targeting: This allows advertisers to deliver ads based on the physical location of the screens. For example, a retail store can target ads to screens within a certain radius to attract nearby customers.
  • Demographic Targeting: By utilizing data on age, gender, income, and other demographic factors, ads can be tailored to appeal to specific segments of the population, enhancing relevance and engagement.
  • Contextual Targeting: This involves displaying ads that are relevant to the content or environment where the screen is located, such as showing sports-related ads in a gym or fashion ads in a shopping mall.

Effective targeting not only improves the relevance of advertisements but also increases engagement rates, making it easier for media owners to attract and retain premium advertisers.

Seamless DSP Integration

Seamless integration with Demand-Side Platforms (DSPs) is crucial for streamlining the buying and selling process. Media owners should choose SSP platforms that support integration with leading DSPs, enabling them to access a broader pool of advertisers and maximize revenue potential.

  • Expanded Reach: Integration with multiple DSPs allows media owners to connect with a wider range of advertisers, increasing the chances of filling ad slots and maximizing revenue.
  • Efficient Transactions: Automated and streamlined transactions reduce the manual effort required to manage ad sales, freeing up resources to focus on strategy and optimization.
  • Real-time Bidding: This enables dynamic auctioning of ad slots, ensuring that media owners get the best possible price for their inventory.

By choosing an SSP platform that integrates seamlessly with DSPs, media owners can enhance their operational efficiency and access new revenue streams.

Comprehensive Reporting and Analytics

Insightful reporting and analytics tools are essential for monitoring campaign performance and optimizing strategies. Media owners should select SSP platforms that offer comprehensive reporting dashboards, providing actionable insights into ad impressions, click-through rates, and audience engagement metrics.

  • Comprehensive Dashboards: Detailed dashboards that present key performance indicators (KPIs) in an easy-to-understand format help media owners quickly assess the success of their campaigns.
  • Actionable Insights: Analytics tools that provide insights into what is working and what isn’t allow media owners to make informed decisions and adjust their strategies in real-time.
  • Customizable Reports: The ability to generate customized reports based on specific metrics or timeframes can help media owners tailor their analysis to meet their unique needs.

Advanced reporting and analytics capabilities allow media owners to continuously refine their strategies and enhance campaign performance, ensuring sustained success in the DOOH market.

Harnessing the Power of LMX Connect

At Location Media Xchange, we understand the unique challenges and opportunities that retail media owners face in the evolving DOOH landscape. Our SSP, LMX Connect, is designed to address these needs comprehensively. LMX Connect offers:

  • Advanced Inventory Management: With real-time updates and dynamic pricing, LMX Connect ensures that your digital inventory is always optimized for maximum revenue.
  • Precision Targeting: Utilize our sophisticated targeting capabilities, including geolocation, demographic, and contextual options, to deliver highly relevant ads that resonate with your audience.
  • Seamless DSP Integration: LMX Connect integrates with leading DSPs, expanding your reach and streamlining the ad buying process for greater efficiency and revenue potential.
  • Insightful Reporting: Our platform provides detailed analytics and customizable reports, giving you the actionable insights needed to fine-tune your campaigns and achieve better results.

By leveraging LMX Connect, retail media owners can stay ahead of the competition and fully capitalize on the growing demand for digital out-of-home advertising.

Your Roadmap to DOOH Success

As digital out-of-home advertising continues to evolve, media owners must embrace advanced SSP platforms to stay competitive in the market. Investing in platforms that offer streamlined inventory management, precision targeting, seamless DSP integration, and comprehensive reporting will position media owners for success and enable them to take full advantage of the expanding DOOH landscape. At Location Media Xchange, we are committed to helping you succeed in this dynamic environment. Discover how LMX Connect can transform your advertising strategy and drive significant revenue growth. Contact us today to learn more about our innovative solutions and how we can support your business goals.

title: A Guide to Choosing the Right Content Management System (CMS) for Your DOOH Business
excerpt: For a digital signage owner, good content management ensures the right creatives are playing on the screens whether these are paid advertisements, weather updates, news, or any other information. Deci...
content:
For a digital signage owner, good content management ensures the right creatives are playing on the screens whether these are paid advertisements, weather updates, news, or any other information. Deciding on the content management system (CMS) that will power your network is crucial to ensuring you deliver the ideal experience for those viewing the screens. With the right CMS, you can streamline your operations, enhance viewer engagement, and maximize the return on your investment in digital signage.

What is a Content Management System (CMS)?

A CMS is a platform or software that helps you deliver the right content to the right audience at the right time. With comprehensive digital signage software, you can create, alter, and distribute digital content remotely. This means you can manage and update the content displayed on your digital screens from anywhere, at any time. You'll be able to keep track of all the digital screens in your network from a single computer or mobile device. This centralized control is essential for maintaining consistency and ensuring that your content is always up-to-date and relevant.

Choosing the right CMS is not a decision to be taken lightly. The right system can greatly enhance your ability to manage and deliver content effectively, while the wrong one can lead to inefficiencies and missed opportunities. Here are some key features and considerations to keep in mind when selecting a CMS for your digital out-of-home (DOOH) business.

Choosing the Right CMS

How do you know if the software you have right now is compatible and suited to your needs? Or if you are contemplating getting one, what are the key features to look out for? To help you make an informed decision, let's delve into the crucial aspects you should consider:

  • Cloud-based platforms
  • Automated content delivery features
  • Programmatic Advertising Capabilities

Let's take a closer look at the points above.

Cloud-based platforms

A cloud-based or web-based platform gives you access to all its features by simply logging in on the web. It does not need any installation, making it a convenient and flexible solution. With a cloud-based CMS, campaign implementation and making operational calls anytime, anywhere is now a possibility. This eliminates your need for several systems and allows you to manage various screens on a large network in a simplified manner. 

A cloud-based platform will help you save time and avoid unnecessary expenses associated with maintaining physical servers and infrastructure. Additionally, it offers scalability, so you can easily expand your digital signage network without worrying about technical limitations. The ability to access your CMS from any device with an internet connection means you can make real-time updates and adjustments, ensuring that your content is always current and relevant.

Automated Content Delivery Features

Dynamic and contextual content will increase audience engagement. That is what all advertisers aim for. Being able to deliver that will put you in a sweet spot as a media owner. Technology today allows you to display content that'll change in response to triggers such as time of day, weather conditions, or audience demographics.

For example, in 2020, foodpanda Philippines ran a campaign that combined traffic and weather triggers to display relevant ads to commuters. Such contextual content resonates with audiences because it is timely and relevant. Studies have shown that personalized content significantly boosts engagement and conversion rates. According to a survey, 80% of consumers said that they would make a purchase when met with personalized ads. That is the end goal of all advertisers. Having a system that supports features like this prepares you for the future.

Automated content delivery features also reduce the workload on your team by eliminating the need for manual updates. Once the rules and triggers are set, the CMS will automatically adjust the content based on real-time data, ensuring that your screens always display the most relevant information.

Programmatic Advertising support

CMS software that incorporates programmatic integrations natively helps with inventory monetization. Programmatic advertising allows advertisers to purchase ad space in real-time, based on specific criteria such as audience demographics, location, and behavior. This means that advertisers will have real-time access to your inventory and can make transactions that meet their requirements.

Programmatic advertising measures geolocation data based on audience movement patterns and activates the DOOH inventory in real-time. This makes it easier for media buyers to spot your inventory and place their ads strategically. By offering programmatic capabilities, you can attract more advertisers and increase your revenue potential.

Moreover, programmatic advertising provides valuable insights into the performance of your ad inventory. You can track metrics such as impressions, engagement rates, and conversions, allowing you to optimize your content and improve your ROI.

The Benefits of Choosing the Right CMS

Investing in the right CMS increases your operational efficiency and delivery of cutting-edge content. One such CMS that offers all the features mentioned above and more is LMX Content. This software runs across multiple networks and technology stacks, allowing you to manage all your screens, even if they run on different technologies. 

With LMX Content, you can manage your schedule settings, and the software will handle the rest. It will distribute your content accurately and ensure that it is displayed at the right time and place. This level of automation and control can significantly enhance the effectiveness of your digital signage network.

Investing in the right CMS software will safeguard the future of your business. It will enable you to deliver high-quality, engaging content consistently, attract more advertisers, and optimize your operations. By choosing a CMS that supports cloud-based management, automated content delivery, and programmatic advertising, you can stay ahead of the competition and ensure the long-term success of your DOOH business.

For more information on how to choose the right CMS and maximize the potential of your digital signage network, download our comprehensive eBook. This resource provides in-depth insights into the features and benefits of different CMS platforms, helping you make an informed decision that aligns with your business goals.

title: MovingWalls and Dentsu Africa: Growing the Role of OOH through Automation and Accountability
excerpt: Out-of-Home (OOH) advertising has long stood as a cornerstone of effective marketing. With its ability to capture attention, increase brand awareness, and drive consumer action, OOH has proven its val...
content:
Out-of-Home (OOH) advertising has long stood as a cornerstone of effective marketing. With its ability to capture attention, increase brand awareness, and drive consumer action, OOH has proven its value time and time again. Traditionally, however, the buying and selling methods of outdoor advertising have been somewhat archaic and cumbersome. This often limited the access to OOH media, reserving it for a select group of advertisers who could navigate its complexities. Today, the advent of programmatic technology is transforming this landscape, democratizing access to OOH and making it more efficient and impactful than ever before.

Programmatic technology, which automates the buying and selling process through real-time bidding and data-driven decision-making, has been a game-changer for many advertising channels. In the realm of OOH, it is enabling advertisers to reach their target audiences with unprecedented precision and efficiency. No longer is OOH advertising the exclusive domain of large brands with hefty budgets; it is now accessible to a broader range of advertisers who can leverage its unique strengths to enhance their marketing strategies.

This transformation is exemplified by the partnership between Dentsu Africa and The MovingWalls Group. This collaboration is working to grow the role of OOH across the African continent through automation and accountability. By merging their expertise, these industry leaders are creating a full-stack OOH advertising technology platform that promises to revolutionize the sector.

Empowering OOH Media Owners with Location Media Xchange (LMX)

Central to this initiative is the supply-side platform (SSP) known as LMX Connect. This platform offers a suite of tools designed to bring automation and accountability to OOH media owners. Historically, many of these tools were beyond the reach of smaller operators due to cost or complexity. LMX changes this by providing a comprehensive solution that enables real-time management, buying, and selling of OOH inventory.

For OOH media owners, LMX enables a significant leap forward. The platform's capabilities include advanced inventory management, seamless campaign planning and execution, and real-time campaign tracking and reporting. These features streamline operations, allowing media owners to optimize their resources and focus on delivering exceptional results for their clients.

Accountability and Measurement in OOH Advertising

Another critical aspect of the partnership is the emphasis on accountability. In the past, measuring the effectiveness of OOH campaigns was challenging, often relying on estimates and indirect metrics. The LMX platform addresses this by incorporating robust measurement tools that track key performance indicators such as engagement rates and conversions. This data-driven approach enables media owners to optimize their campaigns continuously and provide clear evidence of ROI to their clients.

By offering transparency and detailed reporting, LMX helps build trust between media owners and advertisers. Clients can see exactly how their campaigns are performing, where their ads are being displayed, and what impact they are having. This level of accountability is crucial in an industry where proving value and effectiveness is essential for securing ongoing investment.

Expanding Opportunities and Revenue Streams

The benefits of the LMX platform extend beyond operational efficiencies and accountability. By adopting this technology, OOH media owners can differentiate themselves in a competitive market. Offering clients cutting-edge tools that enhance campaign performance and provide measurable results can set media owners apart and attract more business.

Moreover, LMX opens up new revenue streams through real-time buying and selling of OOH inventory. This dynamic marketplace approach allows media owners to capitalize on demand as it arises, ensuring they maximize the utilization of their advertising space. Access to a global network of over 200 media owners using LMX further expands market opportunities, facilitating connections with potential clients and partners worldwide.

Another standout feature of the LMX platform is its flexibility and ease of integration. It is designed to work with all OOH formats, including moving media, making it a versatile solution for diverse advertising needs. Additionally, LMX offers bespoke integration services to ensure that the platform seamlessly integrates with existing financial or content management systems. This compatibility reduces the friction associated with adopting new technology, enabling media owners to leverage its benefits without overhauling their current operations.

A Path Forward for OOH Media Owners

The collaboration between Dentsu Africa and MovingWalls highlights the potential for technology to transform traditional industries. For OOH media owners, the LMX platform offers a path to greater efficiency, accountability, and profitability. By embracing automation and data-driven decision-making, media owners can enhance their ability to reach target audiences, demonstrate the value of their advertising, and ultimately drive better results for their clients.

If you are an OOH media owner looking to streamline your operations, improve campaign performance, and access new markets, the LMX platform is a compelling option. To see how LMX can benefit your business, book a free demo today and discover the future of OOH advertising.

title: What Are the Benefits of Programmatic DOOH?
excerpt: With the rise of Digital Out Of Home (DOOH), Programmatic Digital Out Of Home ( pDOOH ) has also become one of the hottest topics in the advertising world. Programmatic DOOH promises big benefits to a...
content:
With the rise of Digital Out Of Home (DOOH), Programmatic Digital Out Of Home (pDOOH) has also become one of the hottest topics in the advertising world. Programmatic DOOH promises big benefits to advertisers as brands are looking to extend their reach to the right audience at the right place in an elegant manner.

Benefits of Programmatic DOOH

The Versatility of Automated Digital Signage

Digital signage can be incredibly versatile, mainly due to its ability to display various content types and its interactive capabilities. Brand owners have the freedom to start, end, and change their ad placements in real-time with just a few clicks. Programmatic DOOH also enables different approaches to reaching the desired audience. Given that people are constantly engaged with their mobile devices, advertisers have the option to serve advertisements to audiences in an area if they did not interact with the billboards. Conversely, ads can still be delivered to mobile devices to influence consumer purchasing decisions.

A Different Approach

Automated digital signage content makes shopping in a retail store feel like shopping in an online store. This is not just because of the presence of large touchscreens; consumers can interact with interactive screens instead of speaking to a human, which can sometimes lead to an unpleasant experience. During the COVID-19 pandemic, there was a surge in digital standees equipped with cameras that measure temperature and detect if a person is not wearing a mask, along with built-in sanitizers. These standees also come with QR code scanners that can track where the audience has been, hence calculating the risk of infection. This approach is significantly more efficient compared to a human manually taking temperatures.

Data & Measurement

In the past, end-to-end measurement was a common concern in OOH advertising, as it was essentially non-existent. The implementation of IoT devices now enables marketers to measure metrics like footfall, potential views, and more. Marketers can identify the types of audiences and their interests around the vicinity. Combining the capabilities of programmatic DOOH, marketers can leverage this data to precisely target their desired audiences with relevant messaging, ensuring optimal ad spend and campaign performance.

Less Manual Work = Less Human Error

No human is perfect, and we all know that. Publishers and advertisers have been relying on rate cards and Excel sheets for a long time. Whenever human labor is involved, there's always a chance of human error. In our previous video on programmatic DOOH, we talked about different types of programmatic buying that can minimize human errors by automating processes and reducing manual intervention.

Transparency

In addition to minimizing human errors, auctions in programmatic buying display the price and bids on the Demand Side Platform (DSP) to all users. Publishers must put up their best competitive price to attract advertisers. Advertisers can also enjoy the advantages of programmatic advertising with real-time proof of play from programmatic DOOH, ensuring transparency and accountability.

The benefits of programmatic DOOH are clear – versatility, innovative approaches, data-driven targeting, reduced errors, and transparency. However, to truly unlock the full potential of this powerful advertising medium, brands and agencies need a reliable partner with cutting-edge technology and expertise.

At MovingWalls, we are at the forefront of programmatic DOOH solutions. Our advanced platforms and extensive network enable brands to reach their desired audiences with precision and impact. With robust audience analytics, real-time optimization capabilities, and seamless integration with mobile and digital channels, we empower brands to execute truly omnichannel campaigns that captivate and convert.

One recent success story involves a leading automotive brand that leveraged our programmatic DOOH solutions to promote their latest electric vehicle model. By combining location-based targeting with contextual data insights, we identified high-potential areas frequented by environmentally conscious consumers. Dynamic digital billboards and interactive kiosks displayed targeted messaging and immersive brand experiences, driving awareness and consideration for the new EV.

Start with every Possibility. Partner with MovingWalls to unlock the full potential of programmatic DOOH and elevate your advertising strategies to new heights.

title: DOOH Advertising during Ramadan - Best Practices for Delivering More Impactful Campaigns
excerpt: Ramadan is a highly anticipated time of the year for Muslims around the world. It is a time of reflection, prayer, and fasting, but it is also a time for family gatherings, shopping, and enjoying a wi...
content:
Ramadan is a highly anticipated time of the year for Muslims around the world. It is a time of reflection, prayer, and fasting, but it is also a time for family gatherings, shopping, and enjoying a wide variety of delicious foods and beverages. For FMCG owners, this presents a unique opportunity to connect with consumers and drive sales through effective advertising strategies.

One such strategy is Digital Out-of-Home (DOOH) advertising, which is a highly effective way to reach a large audience and create brand awareness. In recent years, DOOH advertising during Ramadan has become increasingly popular, as it offers a cost-effective and impactful way to engage with consumers.

Through our Moving Audiences Xchange platform, advertisers can not only identify the prominent and highly valued sites in areas with the highest concentration of traffic but also create ad-serving rules to ensure relevant messages are displayed during different times of the day.

For example, we worked with Frestea Brand to create Ramadan advertising campaigns in Indonesia that targeted consumers in areas with high pedestrian traffic. The sites chosen were within proximity to malls and residential areas, where people typically gather to break their fast. The play hours were day-parted to 2 hours (4 p.m. to 6 p.m.) for each site, which allowed Frestea to maximize its exposure during the peak hours when meal decisions are being made.

Now,  how else can FMCG advertisers maximize their Ramadan communication strategy using DOOH advertising? Here are a few valuable tips:

Tap into Location Data to Identify High-Traffic Areas: One of the key advantages of DOOH advertising is that it allows you to target consumers in high-traffic areas and nearby to points of purchase. By identifying areas where consumers gather during Ramadan, you can create a highly targeted advertising campaign that resonates with your consumers.

Deliver More with Dayparting: Dayparting is the practice of scheduling ads to run during specific times of the day. By dayparting your ads during peak hours, you can maximize your exposure and reach a larger audience when they are most receptive to your messaging.

Leverage Point of Interest Data: DOOH advertising options tend to be present near different types of venues, but a lot of the focus remains on just the type and location of the screen itself. It is a good idea to understand where your audience is going after passing by DOOH sites to make informed advertising decisions. For example, are audiences traveling home (delivery messaging may make more sense) or going to restaurants and shopping malls (last-minute dine-in promotions would drive footfall)?

Be Creative and Engaging: Ramadan is a time of celebration and joy, so it is important for the messaging to include some of this context. By leveraging the power of DOOH advertising, you can create visually stunning and larger-than-life imagery that immediately makes a bigger impact than small-screen creatives.

Integrate with Other Channels: To maximize the impact of your Ramadan DOOH campaign, consider integrating it with other marketing channels such as social media, influencer partnerships, and in-store promotions. This omnichannel approach ensures that your brand message is consistently reinforced across multiple touchpoints, increasing brand recall and engagement.

DOOH advertising is a highly effective way to drive higher sales and brand awareness for FMCG brand owners during Ramadan. By following these tips and working with a reputable DOOH advertising agency like MovingWalls, you can create a highly effective advertising strategy that resonates with your target audience and helps you achieve your business objectives.

At MovingWalls, we understand the nuances of Ramadan advertising and how to leverage DOOH to its fullest potential. Our advanced audience intelligence and campaign optimization tools ensure that your ads are delivered to the right people, at the right time, and in the right context.

One of our recent success stories involved a leading beverage brand that partnered with us for their Ramadan DOOH campaign. By combining location-based targeting with dayparting and contextual data insights, we identified high-traffic areas near mosques, shopping malls, and residential neighborhoods during prime evening hours. Dynamic digital billboards displayed visually captivating creatives, driving brand awareness and consideration. The campaign resulted in over 3 million impressions and a significant uplift in sales during the Ramadan period.

Discover how DOOH advertising can create an unforgettable Ramadan marketing strategy for your FMCG brand. Let MovingWalls help you connect with your audience and drive higher sales this festive season.

title: How DOOH advertising can Amplify User Generated Content
excerpt: Digital Out-of-Home (DOOH) media is becoming a big draw for startups and primarily digital brands who are looking to boost awareness. This is being driven by the increasing saturation of advertising c...
content:
Digital Out-of-Home (DOOH) media is becoming a big draw for startups and primarily digital brands who are looking to boost awareness. This is being driven by the increasing saturation of advertising content on digital platforms. To add to this, these platforms are becoming more competitive, which in turn means higher CPMs.

In DOOH screens, these brands have the perfect canvas to amplify interesting content that, in the past, would have only lived on social media platforms. By seamlessly integrating digital out-of-home into their marketing mix, brands can extend the reach and impact of their digital campaigns, driving engagement beyond the confines of social media and online platforms.

In this article, we'll explore some compelling DOOH examples of how brands have leveraged DOOH to drive more engagement for their digital and especially user-generated content, showcasing the power of this medium to amplify brand storytelling.

Why DOOH Advertising and UGC Work So Well Together?

DOOH advertising provides a unique opportunity to reach consumers in real-time, at the right place and time, which has proven to be highly effective in complementing other media channels. By using dynamic creatives, DOOH campaigns can be highly targeted and personalized to the viewer. This creates a more relevant and engaging experience, which is essential to capturing the attention of today's distracted consumers.

User-generated content (UGC), on the other hand, allows brands to tap into the power of their audience. When consumers share their experiences with a brand on social media, they are essentially becoming brand ambassadors. By featuring user-generated content in DOOH campaigns, brands can humanize their message and create a more authentic connection with their audience.

Moreover, the use of UGC in DOOH campaigns has proven to be highly effective in driving engagement and participation among social media users. By showcasing user-generated content on high-reach DOOH screens, brands can extend the reach of their message and create a truly integrated marketing campaign.

If you're looking to boost engagement with your advertising, consider incorporating UGC into your DOOH campaign. By doing so, you can create a more personalized and engaging experience for your audience and drive real results. And with experts like MovingWalls at your disposal, you can rest assured that your campaign will be executed seamlessly and effectively.

Case Study: Candy Bar Brand Amplifies Branded Content Created by Users

A chocolate bar brand was running a digital campaign where users could take selfies and use filters to modify their images to show how they’d look when they were in a certain mood - angry, tired, bored, and so on. The brand connected this campaign to spectacular DOOH screens across Malaysia so that the best of these images could be broadcast to a wider audience.

The campaign used dynamic creative templates that would automatically update with the latest user-generated pictures curated by the brand’s marketing team.

The integration of the DOOH campaign to this primarily digital campaign enabled the brand to reach more than  2.7 million more additional impressions beyond digital.

Case Study: Pizza Delivery Brand Shares the Love

On Valentine’s Day 2020, Domino’s created an on-ground experience with DOOH as the centrepiece. The iconic “Cube” screen in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia was taken over to share thousands of heartfelt messages.

Users would be able to enter a simple message through Domino’s online presence and that same message would be broadcast on the big screen. Users who passed by the venue and shared their messages were also able to sample pizza slices at the experience. More than 8,000 messages were shared on the Valentine’s Day portal and broadcast on the screen.

MovingWalls' advanced DOOH platforms enable brands to seamlessly integrate user-generated content into dynamic DOOH creatives, ensuring a truly engaging and personalized experience for audiences. Our robust audience intelligence and real-time optimization capabilities ensure that your UGC-powered DOOH campaigns are delivered to the right people, at the right time, and in the right context, maximizing impact and driving measurable results. Contact us today to get your DOOH campaign going.

title: Amplify Your Sporting Events with OOH Advertising
excerpt: As the sporting season heats up, it's the perfect time to leverage the power of Out-of-Home (OOH) advertising to captivate audiences, promote sporting events, and support teams. In this blog post, we...
content:
As the sporting season heats up, it's the perfect time to leverage the power of Out-of-Home (OOH) advertising to captivate audiences, promote sporting events, and support teams. In this blog post, we will explore how OOH advertising can play a crucial role in amplifying sporting events, engaging audiences, and driving brand success.

Out-of-Home (OOH) advertising provides exceptional benefits for sporting tournaments, offering unparalleled reach to diverse audiences in high-traffic areas. It effectively builds excitement and anticipation leading up to events while enhancing brand visibility for sponsors and teams. Large-format displays create immersive experiences, capturing the attention of passersby and sports enthusiasts alike. OOH strategically targets fans at venues and surrounding areas, driving ticket sales and increasing attendance. Moreover, digital OOH platforms can provide real-time updates and match information, keeping fans engaged and informed. This dynamic form of advertising not only amplifies the tournament's presence in the public space but also creates a buzz that extends beyond traditional media channels, making it an invaluable tool for promoting sporting events and maximizing their impact.

The Power of OOH Advertising during Sporting Events

Sporting events, especially high-profile and international ones in Asia, attract massive audiences and provide a unique opportunity for brands to connect with enthusiastic fans. OOH advertising is an integral part of the marketing mix for organizers and brands during these events. With the advancements in technology, programmatic OOH advertisements can now incorporate real-time sports scores as triggers, making the connection between the event and the advertisement even more seamless.

Benefits of OOH Advertising for Sporting Events

Wide Reach and Impactful Branding

OOH advertising allows brands to reach a large and diverse audience. With strategically placed billboards, signage, and digital displays near event venues, brands can grab the attention of passionate fans and create lasting brand impressions. The physical presence of OOH ads enhances the overall event experience for attendees, increasing brand recall and affinity.

Engaging Creativity

With OOH advertising, brands have the freedom to showcase their creativity and make a memorable impact. From large-scale billboards to interactive digital displays, brands can use eye-catching visuals, engaging content, and innovative technologies to connect with fans on a deeper level and generate excitement around the sporting event.

Amplifying Event Sponsorship

Brands often choose to support teams or events through sponsorship. OOH advertising provides an ideal platform to showcase this support and align the brand with the excitement and passion of the sporting event. By prominently displaying sponsor logos, messages, and calls-to-action, brands can further increase their visibility, build brand loyalty, and enhance their association with the event.

Contextual Relevance

OOH ads placed in strategic locations near sports venues or along routes frequented by fans offer contextual relevance, increasing the likelihood of capturing attention and driving engagement. Fans are primed and receptive to sports-related messaging in these environments, making OOH a powerful channel.

Data-Driven Optimization

Modern OOH advertising solutions offer robust data and analytics capabilities, allowing brands to optimize their campaigns in real-time. By tracking metrics like impressions, viewability, and audience demographics, brands can refine their strategies, adjust creative executions, and maximize the impact of their OOH investments during sporting events.

For Brands

OOH can also be used to showcase behind-the-scenes content, exclusive interviews, or player endorsements, adding a human touch to the brand's messaging. Interactive elements, such as QR codes or augmented reality features, can be incorporated into OOH displays, allowing fans to access additional content or participate in brand activations directly from their smartphones.

During major tournaments or milestone events, brands can use OOH to create immersive experiences, transforming public spaces into fan zones or virtual stadiums. This not only increases brand visibility but also creates memorable experiences that strengthen the emotional connection between fans, teams, players, and the associated brands.

Sporting events provide an incredible opportunity for brands and agencies to connect with passionate fans and promote their products or services. Leveraging OOH advertising during these events can amplify the overall experience, create lasting brand impressions, and drive business success. At MovingWalls, we offer end-to-end solutions that enable brands and agencies to harness the power of DOOH advertising and maximize their impact during sporting events.

Our programmatic OOH platforms allow for seamless integration of real-time data, enabling dynamic ad content tailored to the live action. Coupled with advanced audience analytics and optimization tools, you can precisely target and engage your desired demographics in the right context. Whether through large-format digital billboards, venue signage, or interactive experiences, we help elevate your brand's presence and make a lasting impression on sports enthusiasts.

Ready to take your sporting event advertising to new heights? Contact us and leverage the power of OOH advertising for your brand today!

title: Connecting the World of Online to Offline
excerpt: Out of Home (OOH) Advertising has long been a powerful tool for reaching a mass audience through a single signage. However, it has traditionally been challenging to measure the effectiveness of this a...
content:
Out of Home (OOH) Advertising has long been a powerful tool for reaching a mass audience through a single signage. However, it has traditionally been challenging to measure the effectiveness of this advertising medium, as it is difficult to track the direct link between OOH exposure and subsequent purchases. Additionally, the proliferation of mobile devices has shifted consumer attention away from traditional OOH advertising, leading to lower engagement rates and wasted advertising spending.

Brands and agencies that have invested heavily in traditional OOH advertising campaigns in the past, will know the struggles to see the desired results. It can be hard to make informed decisions when there isn't an effective way to quantify the impact of a campaign, especially considering the substantial costs often involved with OOH advertising buys. When investments in OOH fall short of delivering measurable results, it can be hard to quantity another OOH spend. 

MovingWalls' Omnichannel solution solves the problem of ineffective OOH advertising by tightly integrating it with mobile and digital channels. This extends the overall reach and enables improved contextual targeting. By seamlessly connecting mobile devices with OOH advertising touchpoints, Omnichannel provides a unified view of the entire customer journey. This allows advertisers to accurately track user engagement rates and effectively measure return on investment.

One of the standout features of MovingWalls' Omnichannel solutions is the powerful Sequenced OOH and Mobile Targeting capability. This enables advertisers to reinforce initial OOH messaging with follow-up engagement across multiple complementary channels, dramatically increasing overall engagement rates with the target audience.

As an example, imagine a restaurant chain aiming to drive more foot traffic to their various locations. They could leverage MovingWalls' platform to target customers within a tight radius of 200 meters from each restaurant through OOH displays. This OOH exposure could then be seamlessly coupled with mobile ads or push notifications highlighting current menu discounts and promotions. This sequential multi-channel messaging strategy helps cement the initial OOH impression, significantly increasing the likelihood that the customer will then visit and make a purchase.

The Omnichannel solution also provides extended frequency capabilities, allowing brands to re-target and re-engage audiences that showed interest in previous OOH campaigns. This allows advertisers to maintain consistent connections with prospects over time and build long-lasting customer relationships. When combined with the sequenced multi-channel approach, these strategies lead to dramatically higher engagement rates and ultimately drive more conversions and sales.

In addition to the powerful audience targeting and messaging sequencing, MovingWalls provides robust analytics that deliver invaluable insights to guide optimization and strategy. Advertisers gain a granular multi-channel view into impressions, engagement, and response metrics. This allows data-driven decision-making to continually refine campaigns towards maximum impact.

Out-of-home advertising can be an incredibly effective channel when executed with a strategic omnichannel approach. Thanks to MovingWalls' integrated Omnichannel solutions, advertisers can significantly improve the efficiency and measurable effectiveness of their OOH campaigns. By leveraging these tools, brands can reach a wider audience, increase engagement rates across channels, drive more conversions, and accurately quantify results - all seamlessly managed through a single platform.

If you've been frustrated by OOH spending that cannot be justified or the inability to track returns, it's time to move your advertising in the right direction with MovingWalls' Omnichannel solutions. Gain a truly unified view of your customer's journey, deploy sequential targeted messaging across OOH and mobile touchpoints, and make data-driven optimizations based on comprehensive analytics. Unlock the power of OOH and elevate your overall marketing performance.

title: DOOH: The Perfect Political Marketers' Platform
excerpt: Digital Out-of-Home (DOOH) advertising has revolutionized political campaigning, offering unprecedented ways to engage voters and influence public opinion. Its capacity to swiftly deliver impactful me...
content:
Digital Out-of-Home (DOOH) advertising has revolutionized political campaigning, offering unprecedented ways to engage voters and influence public opinion. Its capacity to swiftly deliver impactful messages makes it an indispensable tool for politicians globally.

In the dynamic world of politics, DOOH enables campaigns to present striking messages through digital billboards, transit displays, and interactive kiosks. The visual nature of DOOH facilitates the creation of attention-grabbing content that can convey complex policy positions or emotional appeals in mere seconds. DOOH's presence in public spaces ensures repeated exposure to campaign messages, as commuters, shoppers, and pedestrians encounter these displays multiple times daily. This repetition reinforces key points and increases brand recognition for politicians or parties, particularly benefiting lesser-known candidates in building name recognition or established figures in reinforcing their positions.

Programmatic DOOH elevates political advertising by introducing data-driven insights and real-time audience targeting. Campaigns can customize messaging to reach specific demographics, behaviors, and locations crucial to their political objectives. This precision targeting optimizes advertising spend by focusing on the most relevant audiences. For instance, a candidate championing education reform can target displays near educational institutions, directly reaching parents, students, and educators. Furthermore, programmatic DOOH allows campaigns to adjust messaging in real-time based on external factors like breaking news, poll results, or competitor actions—an agility invaluable in the rapidly shifting landscape of political campaigns.

Dynamic Creative Optimization (DCO) in DOOH empowers campaigns to engage audiences with contextually relevant content linked to current affairs or local issues. By programmatically updating content, campaigns can resonate more deeply with constituents and address their concerns effectively. DCO facilitates the creation of numerous ad variations, each tailored to specific audience segments or geographic locations, ensuring the right message reaches the right audience at the right time. A national campaign, for example, can create localized ad versions addressing issues relevant to each state or district. Additionally, DCO is cost-effective, allowing campaigns to maximize impact with smaller budgets by concentrating on high-impact locations and target audiences.

Programmatic DOOH integrates seamlessly with other advertising channels such as mobile and online, reinforcing campaign messages across multiple touchpoints. This cross-channel integration enables sophisticated retargeting strategies, creating a surround-sound effect that amplifies the frequency and impact of the campaign's message. The ability to track and measure cross-channel exposure yields valuable insights into overall campaign effectiveness, facilitating data-driven optimization of the entire media mix.

DOOH generates real-time audience behavior, engagement rates, and messaging effectiveness. This data can inform future advertising decisions and broader campaign strategies. By analyzing which DOOH ads generate the most engagement or social media mentions, campaigns can refine their messaging to focus on issues and themes that resonate most strongly with voters.

In an era of political polarization and misinformation, DOOH offers a unique opportunity to establish authenticity and credibility. The public nature of DOOH advertising demonstrates a willingness to stand behind campaign positions. Quick content updates allow campaigns to respond to events or address misinformation promptly, fostering perceptions of transparency and accessibility.

DOOH can also actively engage voters and encourage civic participation. Interactive displays can provide information on voter registration and polling locations or allow viewers to submit questions. Incorporating QR codes or NFC technology can drive direct actions, such as visiting a campaign website or making donations.

As technology advances and voter behavior evolves, DOOH will play an increasingly central role in political advertising. Its ability to deliver targeted, impactful messages at scale while integrating seamlessly with other digital channels makes it an unparalleled tool for modern campaigns. For political campaigns aiming to stay ahead of the curve and connect meaningfully with voters, embracing programmatic DOOH is not just an option—it's a necessity. By leveraging this dynamic medium, campaigns can cut through the noise, deliver their message with precision, and ultimately shape the political landscape in their favor.

At MovingWalls, we ensure that clients can use channels people trust. This allows us to layer in the right data and insights so we make sure to target the right prospective voter at the right time and place.

title: Captivate and Convert: Mastering Digital Signage for Brands and Agencies
excerpt: In today's digitally-driven world, capturing customers' attention has become an immense challenge for businesses and agencies alike. As attention spans dwindle and competition for consumer engagement...
content:
In today's digitally-driven world, capturing customers' attention has become an immense challenge for businesses and agencies alike. As attention spans dwindle and competition for consumer engagement intensifies, the need for impactful and innovative marketing solutions has never been more crucial. Enter digital signage – a powerful tool that has the potential to revolutionize the way you connect with your target audience and drive meaningful results.

In an era of information overload, businesses face the daunting task of breaking through the noise to reach their target audience. Traditional marketing methods are increasingly falling short as consumers become adept at tuning out conventional advertising. This shift has sparked a search for more dynamic and engaging ways to capture attention and convey brand messages. Amidst this evolving landscape, digital signage has emerged as a compelling solution, offering a fresh approach to customer engagement and brand visibility.

Digital signage technology harnesses the power of visual communication, allowing businesses to deliver targeted, timely, and eye-catching content in public spaces. By blending the immediacy of digital media with the physical presence of outdoor advertising, this innovative medium is reshaping how companies interact with potential customers in real-world environments.

Mastering digital signage requires a comprehensive strategy that accounts for your specific goals, target audience, and desired outcomes. Here's a guide to help you unlock the full potential of this marketing powerhouse:

Understand Your Audience: The foundation of any successful digital signage strategy begins with a deep understanding of your target audience. Start by exploring their demographics, preferences, behaviors, and purchase journey. This valuable insight will enable you to tailor your content and messaging to resonate with their interests and needs, ultimately captivating their attention and fostering deeper engagement.

Choose the Right Content: With your audience insights in hand, craft compelling digital signage content that speaks directly to them. Leverage eye-catching visuals, dynamic motion graphics, interactive experiences, and persuasive calls-to-action that align with your marketing objectives. Remember, context is key – the most effective content will be relevant to the specific location and situation where your displays are situated.

Implement Strategic Placement: Thoughtful placement of your digital signage is critical for maximizing impact and viewability. Conduct thorough site surveys to identify high-traffic areas frequented by your target audience. Consider factors like dwell times, line-of-sight, and viewer distance to ensure optimal visibility and engagement.

Leverage the Right Technology: Partner with a reputable digital signage provider that offers robust hardware and software solutions tailored to your needs. Choose displays with vibrant visuals, high resolution, and dynamic content capabilities. Pair this with robust digital signage software that provides comprehensive content management, scheduling, and analytics capabilities, allowing you to effortlessly curate, distribute, and measure the impact of your campaigns.

For Brands

Brands associated with teams and players can leverage OOH advertising to create highly relevant and personalized content, fostering deeper connections with fans. By utilizing dynamic digital billboards, these brands can display real-time statistics, player achievements, and team updates, keeping fans engaged and informed. Personalized messaging can be tailored to specific locations or events, such as congratulating a local player near their hometown or promoting team merchandise before a big game.

OOH can also be used to showcase behind-the-scenes content, exclusive interviews, or player endorsements, adding a human touch to the brand's messaging. Interactive elements, such as QR codes or augmented reality features, can be incorporated into OOH displays, allowing fans to access additional content or participate in brand activations directly from their smartphones.

During major tournaments or milestone events, brands can use OOH to create immersive experiences, transforming public spaces into fan zones or virtual stadiums. This not only increases brand visibility but also creates memorable experiences that strengthen the emotional connection between fans, teams, players, and the associated brands.

Measure and Optimize: Digital signage offers a unique advantage – the ability to track and analyze the performance of your campaigns in real-time. Leverage the built-in analytics tools provided by your digital signage software to monitor metrics such as impressions, dwell times, interactive touches, and audience demographics. This data-driven approach will enable you to refine your content, optimize your strategies, and continuously improve the effectiveness of your digital signage campaigns, ensuring that you achieve your marketing goals and deliver measurable results.

MovingWalls' digital signage platforms, such as Moving Audiences Xchange (MAX), empower businesses and agencies to captivate and convert customers through strategic digital signage initiatives. MAX offers a comprehensive solution for businesses seeking to optimize their digital signage strategy. By leveraging this platform, businesses can enhance customer engagement, personalize content, and drive revenue growth effectively. The platform's interactive features and real-time analytics enable businesses to make data-driven decisions, improving overall customer experiences and maximizing ROI.

MovingWalls' software provides robust content management, scheduling, and analytics capabilities, ensuring seamless distribution and real-time performance tracking across your digital signage network. With strategic placement and the ability to measure and optimize your campaigns, you can continuously improve the effectiveness of your digital signage initiatives.

By leveraging MovingWalls' digital signage platforms, businesses and agencies can unlock the full potential of digital signage, driving meaningful results and transforming the way they connect with their audience in today's competitive landscape. Take a look at how RKG Ghee harnessed the power of programmatic DOOH – they connected with festival-goers during important times, making their brand more noticeable and memorable in the lively setting of Thaipusam.
